entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary crop studied for its response to iron toxicity in acid sulfate soils

entities.name: IR-32 RICE
entities.description: The specific rice variety used in the pot experiments

entities.name: IRON TOXICITY
entities.description: A condition where excess iron in the soil solution harms the plant

entities.name: ACID SULFATE SOIL
entities.description: A type of soil characterized by high acidity and potential for iron toxicity

entities.name: CONTINUOUS FLOODING
entities.description: A water regime where the soil is kept constantly flooded

entities.name: FLOODING WITH SOIL DRYING
entities.description: A water regime involving alternating periods of flooding and drying

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and growth of the rice plants

entities.name: SOIL ACIDITY
entities.description: The level of acidity in the soil, which can be aggravated by drying and reflooding
